## Summary

Indo Premier Sekuritas previews Q1 2026 metals sector earnings, highlighting Average Selling Price (ASP) increases that will boost net profit (NP), with Aneka Tambang (ANTM) expected to deliver the strongest results.

## Key Points

• **ASP tailwinds**: Higher average selling prices across nickel and related metals to boost Q1 2026 net profits
• **ANTM standout**: Aneka Tambang (ANTM) positioned to deliver the best Q1 results among metal stocks
• **Sector beneficiaries**: ANTM, INCO, and ESSA all tagged as relevant tickers for this earnings preview
• **Earnings catalyst**: Q1 2026 results expected to show strong YoY improvement driven by commodity price strength

## Portfolio Impact

🟢 **Positive for ESSA** — Your ESSA position (445 lots, avg 791.18) is directly mentioned in this metals sector preview. The ASP increase narrative supports:
- Ammonia/chemical pricing strength benefiting ESSA's core business
- Q1 2026 earnings could surprise positively when reported
- Current +8.7% unrealized gain (+Rp 3.06M) may extend further

**Watch for**: ESSA Q1 2026 earnings announcement (expected ~Apr 30). With portfolio already +Rp 4.60M (+3.54%) today, strong ESSA earnings could push total P&L toward +Rp 5M+.
